impact: Advances the PP&D DevHub automation plan by validating draft page form-state fixtures without opening a browser, authenticating, or storing private session artifacts.
summary: Add fixture-only DevHub draft form-state contract coverage with accessible Playwright selector metadata and redacted values.
target_task: Task checkbox-67: Task checkbox-62: Add a fixture-only Playwright form-state contract test for DevHub draft pages using accessible selectors, labels, roles, required flags, redacted values, and no live browser session. Superseded for retry by checkbox-67 after repeated no-accepted-patch daemon rounds.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
